info.title: IoT DC3 REST API
info.description:
IoT DC3 platform REST API documentation.

Covers all service modules: auth (authentication and authorization),
manager (device/driver/point/profile configuration), data (telemetry,
events, commands, notifications), and agentic (AI chat and tools).

Authentication: obtain a salt and token via /api/v3/auth/token/*, then
use the Authorize button to set X-Auth-Tenant, X-Auth-Login, and
X-Auth-Token. X-Auth-Token is a JSON object {"salt":"...","token":"..."}.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

tags.name: provider
tags.description: AI model provider configuration: manage provider endpoints, authentication credentials, and capability specifications for connecting to LLM services

tags.name: model
tags.description: AI model registry: manage model metadata including name, version, capabilities, context limits, and provider associations

tags.name: attachment
tags.description: Agent conversation attachments: manage files, images, and structured data objects associated with AI agent conversation messages

tags.name: action
tags.description: Agent action definitions: manage AI agent tool definitions including parameter schemas, execution handlers, and result formats for agentic workflow orchestration

tags.name: message
tags.description: Agent conversation messages: manage messages exchanged between AI agents and language models within conversation sessions including user prompts and assistant responses

tags.name: chat
tags.description: AI chat operations: handle real-time chat interactions including message streaming, tool calling, and conversation context management with language models

tags.name: session
tags.description: Agent conversation sessions: create, manage, and terminate AI agent conversation contexts including message history and tool invocation state

post.description: Update editable fields of an AI chat session identified by conversation id, scoped to the current user and tenant. Use to rename or adjust a session; returns the updated session, or a failure when it does not exist.

parameters.name: conversation_id
parameters.description: Unique conversation identifier scoped to the current user and tenant; identifies the session whose editable fields (e.g. name) are to be updated.

post.description: Page through the current user's AI chat sessions for this tenant. Returns a page of session summaries; use to resume or browse past conversations.
Permanently delete an AI chat session and its message history by conversation id, scoped to the current user and tenant. Use to discard a conversation; this cannot be undone.

parameters.name: conversation_id
parameters.description: Unique conversation identifier scoped to the current user and tenant; identifies the session to permanently delete along with its message history.

post.description: Update an existing LLM provider for the current tenant, changing its base URL, credentials or capability spec. Returns the updated provider; the target must belong to the current tenant.

Permanently remove an LLM provider from the current tenant by id. Returns true on success; model configurations bound to this provider will no longer resolve, so call only when the provider is unused.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Primary key of the entity to delete. Must belong to the current tenant.

post.description: Register a new upstream LLM provider for the current tenant with its base URL, credentials and capability spec. Returns the created provider; reference it afterwards when defining model configurations.
Update an existing AI model configuration's provider, model id or parameters for the current tenant. Returns the updated configuration; changes apply to future sessions that select this model.
Permanently delete the AI model configuration identified by id within the current tenant. Returns true on success; the model is no longer selectable in new sessions.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Primary key of the entity to delete. Must belong to the current tenant.

post.description: Create an AI model configuration for the current tenant binding a provider, model id and parameters. Returns the saved configuration; the assistant can then use it as a selectable model in a session.

Submit a chat prompt with conversation context and receive the assistant reply using the OpenAI-compatible completion format. When the request sets stream=true the reply is streamed token by token over SSE; otherwise it returns the full reply as a single JSON response.

Upload a file as an attachment to the given AI conversation for the current tenant and user. Returns the stored attachment metadata; the file then becomes available as context the assistant can reference in that conversation.

parameters.name: conversation_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the AI conversation to attach the file to; must belong to the current tenant and user.

post.description: Decline a pending agent tool call by id so the assistant does not execute it. Returns the action with its updated rejected status; call when the user denies a proposed tool invocation.

parameters.name: action_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the pending agent tool call to decline; the action must belong to the current tenant and be in pending state.

post.description: Approve a pending agent tool call by id so the assistant may execute it. Returns the action with its updated confirmed status; call after the user accepts a proposed tool invocation.

parameters.name: action_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the pending agent tool call to approve; the action must belong to the current tenant and be in pending state.

get.description: Fetch a single AI chat session by its conversation id, scoped to the current user and tenant. Returns the session details, or a failure when no matching session exists.

parameters.name: conversation_id
parameters.description: Unique conversation identifier scoped to the current user and tenant; use the value returned when the session was created.

get.description: List the upstream LLM providers configured for the current tenant. Returns each provider's id, name, base URL and capability spec; use to choose a provider when creating a model configuration.
List the AI model options available to the current tenant for selection in a chat session. Returns model ids with display names; use to pick a model before chatting.

List the stored AI model configurations for the current tenant, each binding a provider, model id and parameters. Returns full configuration records for management, unlike the lightweight model options used for chat selection.

List the ordered message history of one AI chat session for the current user and tenant. Returns each turn (user prompts and assistant replies) in chronological order; use to read or resume a past conversation.

parameters.name: conversation_id
parameters.description: Client-visible conversation identifier scoped to the current user and tenant; used to retrieve the full message history of one chat session.

get.description: List the attachments uploaded to the given AI conversation, scoped to the current tenant and user. Returns attachment metadata entries; use to discover files the assistant can reference in that conversation.

parameters.name: conversation_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the AI conversation whose attachments should be listed; must belong to the current tenant and user.

get.description: List agent tool calls awaiting human approval in the given conversation, scoped to the current tenant and user. Returns each pending action with its tool name and parameters so the user can confirm or reject before execution.

parameters.name: conversation_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the agentic conversation whose pending tool calls are to be listed; scoped to the current tenant and user.

RString.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

SessionExt.description: Session extension metadata persisted as JSON

model.description: Identifier of the AI model used for this session (e.g. provider model name).

reasoningEnabled.description: Whether chain-of-thought / extended reasoning capability is enabled for this session.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature controlling response randomness; higher values increase diversity (typically 0.0–2.0).

maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the model may generate in a single response.

id.description: Unique primary key of the record; required on update requests.

remark.description: Free-form remark or description for the record.

creatorId.description: Identifier of the user who created the record; server-populated.

creatorName.description: Display name of the user who created the record; server-populated.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the record was created; server-populated.

operatorId.description: Identifier of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operatorName.description: Display name of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operateTime.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated; server-populated.

conversationId.description: Unique identifier of the conversation this session belongs to.

title.description: Human-readable title summarising the session topic.

sessionExt.description: Extended attributes of the session (model configuration, temperature, context window, etc.); structured as a JSON object.

tenantId.description: Identifier of the tenant that owns this session; enforces tenant-level data isolation.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who created or owns this session; must belong to the same tenant.

RSessionVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

current.description: Current page number, starting from 1; ignored when count is disabled

size.description: Number of records per page; clamped to the configured page-size limit

startTime.description: Inclusive start timestamp (epoch milliseconds) for time-range filtering

endTime.description: Inclusive end timestamp (epoch milliseconds) for time-range filtering

orders.description: Sort order items applied to the query results

page.description: Pagination parameters including page number, page size, sort order, and time range.

tenantId.description: Tenant identifier used to scope this query; only sessions belonging to the specified tenant are returned.

userId.description: Identifier of the user whose sessions are being queried; filters results to sessions owned by this user within the tenant.

conversationId.description: Unique identifier of the conversation to filter sessions by; returns only sessions associated with the specified conversation.

RPageSessionVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

RBoolean.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

id.description: Unique primary key of the record; required on update requests.

remark.description: Free-form remark or description for the record.

creatorId.description: Identifier of the user who created the record; server-populated.

creatorName.description: Display name of the user who created the record; server-populated.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the record was created; server-populated.

operatorId.description: Identifier of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operatorName.description: Display name of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operateTime.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated; server-populated.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the model provider.

providerType.description: Protocol type of the provider's API; determines how requests are formatted and sent.

baseUrl.description: Root URL of the provider's API endpoint; all model requests are sent relative to this base.

defaultFlag.description: Indicates whether this provider is the tenant's default selection; only one provider per tenant may be DEFAULT at a time.

enableFlag.description: Lifecycle state of this provider; DISABLE prevents it from being used in model calls.

tenantId.description: Identifier of the tenant that owns this provider; all operations are scoped to this tenant.

apiKey.description: API key used to authenticate requests to the provider's endpoint. Write-only: never included in API responses.

RModelProviderVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

ModelConfigVO.description: Model configuration response, describing a single AI model and its capability flags within the current tenant.

id.description: Unique primary key of the record; required on update requests.

remark.description: Free-form remark or description for the record.

creatorId.description: Identifier of the user who created the record; server-populated.

creatorName.description: Display name of the user who created the record; server-populated.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the record was created; server-populated.

operatorId.description: Identifier of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operatorName.description: Display name of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operateTime.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated; server-populated.

model.description: Model identifier string as used by the provider API (e.g. OpenAI model name).

label.description: Human-readable display name for the model, shown in the UI.

providerId.description: Identifier of the model provider this configuration belongs to; must belong to the current tenant.

providerName.description: Display name of the model provider, denormalised for read convenience.

stream.description: Whether the model supports streaming (Server-Sent Events) responses.

toolCall.description: Whether the model supports tool/function calling.

vision.description: Whether the model supports vision (image) input.

reasoning.description: Whether the model supports chain-of-thought reasoning output.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature controlling output randomness; typically in the range 0.0–2.0.

maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the model will generate in a single response.

defaultFlag.description: Whether this model is marked as the tenant default; only one model per tenant should be DEFAULT.

enableFlag.description: Enabled/disabled status of this model configuration within the tenant.

tenantId.description: Identifier of the tenant this model configuration belongs to.

RModelConfigVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

ChatCompletionRequestVO.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completion request body; all fields except messages are optional overrides of server-side defaults.

model.description: Advisory model identifier; the actual model used is determined by server-side configuration.

messages.description: Ordered list of conversation messages (system, user, assistant turns) comprising the prompt context.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature in the range [0.0, 2.0]; higher values produce more random output. Null defers to the server default.

maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion. Null defers to the server default.

stream.description: When true, the response is streamed as Server-Sent Events (SSE); when false or omitted, a single JSON response is returned.

conversationId.description: Opaque conversation identifier used to correlate multi-turn memory. If omitted, each request is treated as a new conversation.

attachments.description: List of attachment record IDs (database primary keys) previously uploaded and associated with this completion request.

reasoning.description: When true, requests that the model include its reasoning trace in the response; treated as advisory metadata by the current endpoint.

role.description: Role of the message sender: system, user, assistant, or tool.

content.description: Text content of the message for this conversation turn.
content.example: What is the current temperature of sensor 1024?

AttachmentVO.description: Attachment response view for an agentic conversation attachment record.

id.description: Unique primary key of the record; required on update requests.

remark.description: Free-form remark or description for the record.

creatorId.description: Identifier of the user who created the record; server-populated.

creatorName.description: Display name of the user who created the record; server-populated.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the record was created; server-populated.

operatorId.description: Identifier of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operatorName.description: Display name of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operateTime.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated; server-populated.

conversationId.description: Identifier of the conversation session this attachment belongs to.

fileName.description: Original file name of the uploaded attachment as provided by the client.

contentType.description: MIME content type of the attachment file (e.g. application/pdf, image/png).

size.description: File size of the attachment in bytes.

filePath.description: Server-side storage path where the attachment file is persisted.

RAttachmentVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

ActionVO.description: Response view of an agentic action execution record, including its lifecycle status, payload, and expiry.

id.description: Unique primary key of the record; required on update requests.

remark.description: Free-form remark or description for the record.

creatorId.description: Identifier of the user who created the record; server-populated.

creatorName.description: Display name of the user who created the record; server-populated.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the record was created; server-populated.

operatorId.description: Identifier of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operatorName.description: Display name of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operateTime.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated; server-populated.

actionId.description: Unique string identifier for the agent action execution instance.

conversationId.description: Identifier of the conversation session this action belongs to.

actionType.description: Classification of the action kind, e.g. the tool or function category that was invoked.

title.description: Human-readable title summarizing the action intent, shown in UI and audit logs.

description.description: Detailed description of what the action performs and its expected outcome.
description.example: Reads the latest temperature reading from device 1024 via the sensor query tool.

payload.description: Execution payload including tool name, input parameters, and metadata passed to the execution handler; structure varies by actionType.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the action: PENDING (awaiting confirmation), CONFIRMED (claimed for execution), REJECTED (denied by user), EXECUTED (completed successfully), or FAILED (execution error).

expireTime.description: Timestamp after which the action is automatically cancelled if not yet confirmed or executed.

RActionVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

RListModelProviderVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

model.description: Unique model identifier used when invoking the AI provider API.

label.description: Human-readable display name of the model shown in the UI.

stream.description: Whether the model supports streaming token-by-token responses via SSE.

toolCall.description: Whether the model supports tool/function calling for structured action invocation.

vision.description: Whether the model supports vision (image) input in addition to text.

reasoning.description: Whether the model supports extended chain-of-thought reasoning before answering.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature controlling output randomness; higher values produce more creative responses. Valid range is typically 0.0–2.0.

maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the model may generate in a single response. Capped by the model's context window limit.

RListModelVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

RListModelConfigVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

id.description: Unique primary key of the record; required on update requests.

remark.description: Free-form remark or description for the record.

creatorId.description: Identifier of the user who created the record; server-populated.

creatorName.description: Display name of the user who created the record; server-populated.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the record was created; server-populated.

operatorId.description: Identifier of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operatorName.description: Display name of the user who last updated the record; server-populated.

operateTime.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated; server-populated.

conversationId.description: ID of the conversation session this message belongs to.

role.description: Role of the message sender: user (human input), assistant (AI response), or system (instruction).

content.description: Plain-text message body representing the conversation turn.
content.example: What is the current temperature of device 1024?

contentExt.description: Structured content extension including tool calls, citations, or rich media fragments.

model.description: Identifier of the AI model that generated this message (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-3.5-sonnet).

messageIndex.description: Zero-based ordinal position of this message within the conversation history.

status.description: Persistence status: OK (stored successfully) or ERROR (storage failed).

RListMessageVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

RListAttachmentVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.
